I mean we are talking abt the design of the realm, I think?

The design of the realm is to buff exalt numbers 
Which, unsurprisingly, is an increase of survivability with defensive exalts
And a bigger furnace at lower HP, can't forget that
Maybe I’m thinking too much of saya herself and how does she rly interact with pcaro, cuz her most common usage is just getting thrown in for corrosion and not much else

People that are just throwing her in for corrosion are a bit uncreative IMO. Like, corrosion is broken yeah, but the rest of her kit is really good too. Even in terms of her own survivability, her exalt has some pretty crazy shield on it
It also has some pretty crazy 200 aliemus cost, Idk I find it hard to call the rest of her kit “really good”
The other divine realm characters just felt more suitable to me ig

If you're only focusing on the corrosion, it's sufficient to get anyone easily to a5 status.

Exalt is nice as a bail me out shield.

P.caro increased furnace is good if you know how to utilise it
Like this thing works with the new mechanics, rather than this thing happens to have new mechanics that others can use

A large chunk of Ham's strength came from his Rouse giving buffs letting you doublecast/cost-cut. The game's balance shifted more in favor of teams that can burst, so if you Rouse in boss fights, it's not gonna be on Ham, it's on your DPS first. And bc Ham's buff needs rounds to generate, in arc 2, he's a far less desirable target purely bc he takes a second to go online.

He's still usable, but not exactly a universal support anymore. Up until recently, I was kinda scratching my head for places to slot him before settling on a Vortice/Tawil/Ham/Celeste team
Tldr: meta-drift got his ass
Any slower team

Hes also really good with Castor since you can play free Rondo and then dig for the insights with plumes

Let me try to make a bit of math for you:

Skills past level 3 requires a violet mat that is time gated... aside event, you have, per week:
- one boss reward per week (3-4 mat if lucky)
- 60 mimetic crystal from 2 weekly store (equivalent: 2 mat)

After that, daily:
- 2 mat from the basic daily store, you can maybe refresh once a day in a systainable way, so 4 per day, 28 per week (to be generous: 1 mat)

At that point you are at 6 violets mat a week... skill cost are:
- level 4: 1
- level 5: 2
- level 6: 3
so 6 violet PER skill, so one skill PER week. The character have 5 skills.... and THEN there is the exalt that is more expensive and could takes your 3 weeks of rewards. that 8 weeks to get the mat for a single character, if you have depleted the story rewards

You have 4 characters in a team... 4 x 8 = 32 weeks, half a year par team with some basic addition from dreamscapes?
But why are you getting all your skills to 6 💀
idk if ur talking to me, but i think i should now that you mention it lol

You could not. But that illustrate pretty well, I think, that skills are the game'e bottleneck.... not enlightment, not levels, not characters
If you farm every regular rewards, you'll end to have more characters you want to use that you can decently up
Skills are the time-gated aspect of progression
Mouchette is violent whatever the team you put her in
But I prefer her in Ultra, personnaly

But the rate is still time-gated once your finished the story hard mode, and this is a very important thing to understand
